alt: A biker jumps on their bike while another runs ahead
caption: Phi Gamma Delta cyclists switch out riders during qualifications for the Little 500 on March 28, 2026, at Bill Armstrong Stadium in Bloomington. Phi Gamma Delta placed third in the qualifying race.

alt: biker smiles while passing in front of cheering fans
caption: Fans cheer on a cylist during qualifications for the Little 500 on March 28, 2026, at Bill Armstrong Stadium in Bloomington. Acacia finished 30th in the qualifying race.

alt: biker starts peddaling on a track
caption: Cyclists for Salt Company trade a bike during qualifications for the Little 500 on March 28, 2026, at Bill Armstrong Stadium in Bloomington. Salt finished 11th in the qualifying race.

alt: a biker falls off of their bike infront of a another biker
caption: Cyclists for Christian Student Fellowship crash during qualifications for the Little 500 on March 28, 2026, at Bill Armstrong Stadium in Bloomington. The CSF women's team finished 19th in the 2025 Little 500.

alt: three bikers smile while looking at each other
caption: MaryClaire Swanson (left), Libby Lewis (middle) and Ellie Marsela (right) celebrate after Alpha Chi Omega finishes in the Little 500 qualifications March 28, 2026, at Bill Armstrong Stadium in Bloomington. Alpha Chi Omega finished third in the qualifying race.

alt: two bikers hug
caption: Members of Alpha Epsilon Phi celebrate March 28, 2026, at Bill Armstrong Stadium in Bloomington. The team qualified for the Little 500 race with a time of 03.07.675.

alt: two bikers handoff their bike
caption: Forest Cycling cyclist Griffin Murphy, hands off a bicycle to Joseph Grimes, in the Little 500 qualifications March 28, 2026, at Bill Armstrong Stadium in Bloomington. Forest finished 12th in the qualifying race.

alt: A biker perpares to pedal while another celebrates behind them
caption: Walker Kight (left) hands off a bicycle to Trevor Lichtenstein (right) for Phi Gamma Delta during the Little 500 qualifications March 28, 2026, at Bill Armstrong Stadium in Bloomington. Phi Gamma Delta finished third in the qualifying race.

alt: A biker jumps onto their bike
caption: A member of Army Cycling completes an exchange March 28, 2026, at Bill Armstrong Stadium in Bloomington. The team qualified for the Little 500 race with a time of 02.42.857, the slowest of the 33 teams.

alt: two disappointed bikers are next to a fallen bike
caption: Alpha Kappa Lambda faults March 28, 2026, at Bill Armstrong Stadium in Bloomington. On their second attempt, the team qualified for the Little 500 race with a time of 02.40.640.

alt: fans cheer in the stands
caption: A fan cheers on her team March 28, 2026, at Bill Armstrong Stadium in Bloomington. 36 women’s teams competed to fill the 33 open slots to race in Little 500.

alt: A biker screams
caption: A member of Mother Bears Cycling cheers for his teammate March 28, 2026, at Bill Armstrong Stadium in Bloomington. It was the final lap of the team’s qualification.

alt: two bikers handoff their bike
caption: Members of Bears Cycling complete an exchange March 28, 2026, at Bill Armstrong Stadium in Bloomington. The team qualified for the Little 500 race with a time of 02.30.652 seconds.

alt: A biker cheers infront of a leaderboard
caption: A Beta Sigma Psi rider celebrates March 28, 2026, at Bill Armstrong Stadium in Bloomington. The team qualified for the Little 500 race with a time of 02.29.454 seconds.

alt: A biker pedals on their bike
caption: Rider for team Theta Phi Alpha takes off during qualifications for the Little 500 March 28, 2026, at Bill Armstrong Stadium in Bloomington. Theta Phi Alpha did not place in the 2025 Little 500 race.

alt: Fans cheer with their hands in the air
caption: Supporters for the Kappa Alpha Theta team cheer during qualifications on March 28, 2026, at Bill Armstrong Stadium in Bloomington. Kappa Alpha Theta placed first the last two years in the Little 500 women's race.

alt: Two bikers hug
caption: Delta Gamma cyclers share a hug after completing their qualifying race for Little 500 on March 28, 2026, at Bill Armstrong Stadium in Bloomington. Delta Gamma finished fourth in the qualifying race.

alt: A biker sits on their bike
caption: A cyclist for Delta Zeta races during qualifications for the Little 500 on March 28, 2026, at Bill Armstrong Stadium in Bloomington. Delta Zeta finished 19th in the qualifying race.

alt: A biker pedals their bike
caption: A cyclist for Rideon Cycling races during qualifications for the Little 500 on March 28, 2026, at Bill Armstrong Stadium in Bloomington. Rideon finished 8th in the qualifying race.

alt: Two bikers hug
caption: Cyclists for Christian Student Fellowship hug during qualifications for the Little 500 on March 28, 2026, at Bill Armstrong Stadium in Bloomington. The CSF women's team finished 6th in the qualifying race.
